title: Rentokil FM95 2-Piece Moth Killer Cassette
features: Easy to hang up using the built-in hook
Ideal for cupboards, wardrobes and hanging clothing
Kills eggs, larvae and adult clothes moths
Two units protect an average sized wardrobe
description: From the manufacturer Hangable, fragrant cassette that kills adult clothes moths, larvae and eggs. Ideal for cupboards, wardrobes and hanging clothing. The cassette is easy to hang up using the built-in hook. Two units protect an average sized wardrobe, and the citrus fragrance provides a fresh smell. The date indicator shows exactly when the unit needs renewing.
